name: sidequests
description: A grab-bag of helper tools, born as side quests. Includes photo-reconciler (Google Photos -> iCloud with no duplicates), source-finder (identify the song/source playing in a video or audio clip), session-context (memory, session, state, and context continuity across agent sessions), steam-shortcut (add a non-Steam game to the Steam library by safely editing shortcuts.vdf), display-off-shortcut (Start-menu shortcut + conflict-free hotkey to turn the monitor off), feature (full agile-scrum SDLC pipeline: scope→implement→test→release with plan-mode gate and adversarial review), and bugfix (lightweight scrum bug loop: reproduce-first, fix root cause, regression test, release).
